hero.name: Echedey Aguilar Hernández
hero.description: Passionate about technology, robotics, innovation and nature.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I am Echedey Aguilar Hernandez, originally from Lanzarote. Computer Engineer (Computer Engineering, University of Seville).
I currently work as a laboratory specialist technician on knowledge-generation projects, focused on the REEGREENH2 project.
I am interested in science communication, computer science and robotics, as well as traveling and enjoying nature.
